text.title: Core VUI Design Principles Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: list-use-cases
step.action: Catalogue each voice use case with target turn count.

step.name: apply-simplicity
step.action: Rewrite each candidate response to single-idea + <=15 sec; mark branches.

step.name: set-context-window
step.action: Declare turns_remembered + max_duration_seconds; document reset signal.

step.name: review-and-publish
step.decision-gate: If any rule violated, fix before publish.
